profile.name: Marcus Holloway
profile.bio: Expert in breaking systems to build better ones. Specializing in high-availability cloud infrastructure and IoT security protocols. DedSec operative.

projects.title: Project Zero-Day
projects.synopsis: Automated vulnerability scanner for high-traffic enterprise networks with real-time HUD dashboard.
projects.description: Built a distributed scanning engine capable of profiling 10k nodes per second. Includes a WebSocket-based real-time dashboard visualization.

projects.title: ctOS Bypass
projects.synopsis: Mobile-first IoT bridge for seamless control of municipal smart-city devices.
projects.description: A cross-platform app using low-energy Bluetooth and Zigbee protocols to interface with public smart infrastructure safely.

projects.title: DedSec Hub
projects.synopsis: Decentralized social platform for secure operative communication.
projects.description: P2P network utilizing IPFS and Libp2p for censorship-resistant messaging and data sharing.
